<h3 class="pullHook">The Week of March 4th, 2026</h3>


Teaching: I have class this week at Stevens on AI Management, and doctoral qualitative research proposals and meetings at Case Western Reserve University.

Making: Working on the latest 3D model for the SX-70 Flash Adapter case; I get to meet with the wonderful designer Laura Perrone as well to go over the instruction manual and packaging materials. The kids are running the P2S ragged with prints.

Photography: Finished a role of HP5 in the Leica IIIc. Backlog of roll film to developer reaches 10 35mm rolls. I can't even count all the sheet film, but refilling chemical reserves later this week.

Writing: Working on a new set of blog posts on recent travels. Not as funny as Twain, but who can be?

### About "Now"

This page is to some extent ramblings that are mix of projects or posts yet to come and probably fractions of other things that I post on [Mastodon](https://ribeiro.social/@justin). It's mostly an amusing outlet for me.

The idea of this "now" page is not a new concept (see [nownownow.com](https://nownownow.com/) for other examples. To be honest, I'm not really following the path that is outlined in the original concept per-say; this page exists not to "help me stay focused" as the original intention of the approach states, but this really "Justin has post-it notes on his desk that I'm letting you see". Though I do agree this page isn't going to gain me any new business; that would be a shocking development.😂
